## Why Eton?
####  We're Focused 
Business valuations are subjective and complex. To be robust and audit defensible, you need experienced experts in your corner. At Eton, we do nothing but valuations—it's our speciality.
####  We’re Human 
Should things turn contentious, our valuations are justifiable in court. We use expert human judgment and robust methodologies that no automated valuation could deliver.
####  We’re Trusted 
We've done thousands of business valuations for leading startups, VC firms, legal teams, accountants and high-net worth individuals. Our customer-centric approach to business keeps them coming back.
### End-to-end business appraisal services
## Our Valuation Services
Our valuation and advisory services are built around your specific needs. Each valuation results in a thorough report that provides a detailed overview of your business, drivers of value, valuation and our justification for it. 
We use professional judgment and advanced analytical techniques to deliver a robust, defensible valuation. Should it be challenged, we’ll provide additional support and defend our valuation.

## FAQs
##  Why should I choose Eton's rather than a large "big 4" provider?
Eton’s team is filled with ex-big 4 consultants and highly-trained legal professionals. However, we’re a boutique firm meaning we provide superior service quality and more affordable prices than larger firms can.
##  What methodologies will be used?
Determining the most suitable methodology for a valuation depends on the unique circumstances of the company and the specifics of the project. Key considerations include the company’s funding history, historical and projected financial performance, and the anticipated timing of any liquidity event.
Learn more about our approach to methodologies here:
  * [409A process & methodologies](https://etonvs.com/409a-valuation/409a-valuation-process-and-methodologies)
  * [M&A valuation methods & why your narrative matters](https://etonvs.com/ma/m-and-a-valuation-techniques/)


##  Who performs your valuation services?
Our valuations are performed by our in-house team of highly experienced, certified business valuation specialists. Our team of ex-lawyers and big 4 consultants ensure our services are robust, audit-ready and professional.
##  How much do our valuation services cost?
Our standard valuations typically cost between $2000 and $10,000, but complex cases and large transactions can be significantly more expensive. Our [M&A valuation support](https://etonvs.com/services/ma-valuation-support/) pricing varies significantly, please reach out to us for details.

## New Release: Starting A StartUp
90% of startups fail because founders build products nobody wants.
Not you.
Starting A StartUp isn't theory. It's a battle-tested framework for founders who want results. Fastest team to learn, wins. Not the smartest. Not the richest. Just the team that executes faster than everyone else.
This book takes you from zero to paying customers without wasting time, money, or sanity. Real tactics. No fluff. No excuses.
[![Buy now on Amazon](https://www.founderfriend.io/images/book/amazon.png)](https://www.amazon.com/Starting-StartUp-Build-Something-People/dp/1774586398/?maas=maas_adg_BA6B46F629FCCFF7BE569D18C9E245AD_afap_abs&ref_=aa_maas&tag=maas)
## Who I Work With
I work with founders as a startup coach, founder consultant, and trusted startup advisor—helping them move from idea to traction, with clarity, speed, and systems. From technical builders to venture-backed teams, I help startups scale without the fluff.
I work with founders at different stages and backgrounds. Each brings unique strengths and faces distinct challenges.
### First-Time Founders
### First-Time Founders
You've never done this before. That means you're not carrying bad habits. You're starting with clarity. Let's build something strong from day one.
[Learn More ](https://www.founderfriend.io/founder-types/for-first-time-founders)
### Technical Builders
### Technical Builders
You're technical. You've shipped code. Now it's time to ship a business that scales.
[Learn More ](https://www.founderfriend.io/founder-types/for-technical-founders)
### Corporate Execs
### Corporate Execs
You've run orgs and P&Ls. You see a problem. Let's go solve it your way.
[Learn More ](https://www.founderfriend.io/founder-types/for-corporate-execs)
### Academic Founders
### Academic Founders
You're coming out of research and into reality. We'll translate your work into a market-ready business.
[Learn More ](https://www.founderfriend.io/founder-types/for-academic-founders)
### Practicing MDs
### Practicing MDs
You've led in medicine. Now you're building something bigger. Let's shape the system around your insight.
[Learn More ](https://www.founderfriend.io/founder-types/for-md-founders)
### VC Portfolio Companies
### VC Portfolio Companies
Your backers want results. Let's make the next round inevitable.
[Learn More ](https://www.founderfriend.io/founder-types/for-vc-backed-founders)
### Bootstrapped Builders
### Bootstrapped Builders
You're funding this yourself. Every bet matters. Let's make them count.
[Learn More ](https://www.founderfriend.io/founder-types/for-bootstrapped-builders)
## Where Are You Right Now?
Every startup moves through predictable stages. Each stage has its own challenges, opportunities, and next moves.
### Pre-Idea
You've been circling this for a while. Notes in your phone. Domain half-bought. Maybe even spoke to a dev or two. Sometimes, you're just here for a sanity check. Other times, because no matter how many times you put it down, the idea won't leave you alone.
[Learn More ](https://www.founderfriend.io/startup-stages/pre-idea)
### MVP
You're building. It's ugly. It barely works. But it's real. You're showing it to people. Getting feedback. Maybe even charging. But it's all duct tape and dreams right now.
[Learn More ](https://www.founderfriend.io/startup-stages/mvp)
### First Customer
Someone paid you. Now what? You're figuring out how to do it again. And again. And again. You're learning what works. What doesn't. What you need to change.
[Learn More ](https://www.founderfriend.io/startup-stages/first-customer)
### Some Traction
You have users. Revenue. Fans. But it's all duct tape. You're hiring. Growing. Learning. And trying to keep it all together while you figure out what's next.
[Learn More ](https://www.founderfriend.io/startup-stages/some-traction)
### Early Scale
This might actually be a company. You're in rooms you used to dream about. You're Googling acronyms during board calls. You're building systems. Processes. Teams.
[Learn More ](https://www.founderfriend.io/startup-stages/early-scale)
### Ready to Get Started?
Book your intro with a startup advisor who's helped 1500+ founders go faster.
Let's see if we're a good fit. One call. No commitment. Just clarity.
Book Your Intro Call
### One Job on That Call:
We figure out your North Star.
Clarity on your ultimate destination and why it matters.
We sketch the broad steps to get there.
A high-level roadmap that makes sense for your situation.
Then we throw that map out the window.
And work out what you have to do right now to even have a shot.
Mapped with just the right amount of chaos.
## I'm Not Your Mentor. I'm Your Multiplier.
You own the vision. I help you shape the system around it so it can scale, survive, and thrive.
I don't teach theory. I help you execute.
I don't give advice. I help you build momentum.
I don't sell frameworks. I help you find clarity in chaos.
I don't just talk strategy. I help you make it real.
![James Sinclair co-building with founders](https://www.founderfriend.io/images/JDS-whiteboard.webp)
James Sinclair
## How This Starts
Simple. Direct. No games. We figure out if we should work together.
1
### It starts with a call.
One session. No commitment. We spar, explore, sketch, and see if there's signal.
2
### We see how we think together.
There's no economic intent. Nothing to sell. You can't hire me off one call, and I wouldn't let you. This is a working session to explore your context, pressure test ideas, and decide if we even want to keep going. It has to feel right, for both of us.
3
### You walk away sharper.
Even if we never speak again, the goal is you leave clearer than you came in.
[Learn More ](https://www.founderfriend.io/startup-consulting/how-it-works)
## Your Coach: James Sinclair
James has a track record of success in innovation, entrepreneurship, and startup consulting. He has successfully coached founders in top accelerators such as Y Combinator, TechStars, and Capital Factory, as well as founders at major tech giants like Uber, Airbnb, Shopify, and Google.
With several exits of his own companies to industry leaders such as Boeing and Microsoft, James is highly regarded in the startup community as a founders founder.
> "Crazy good at understanding and getting to value out the gate. Exactly who I need in my corner."
[More About James ](https://www.founderfriend.io/about-founder-coaching/james-sinclair)
![James Sinclair - Professional Portrait](https://www.founderfriend.io/images/jds-profile.jpg)
## What Founders Say
Direct feedback from founders who've worked with me.
[See All Testimonials ](https://www.founderfriend.io/startup-consulting/testimonials)
## Should We Even Work Together?
This isn't for everyone. Here's how to know if we're a fit.
### You shouldn't work with me if:
You can't carve out focused time to work on yourself and your company
You're looking for someone to "fix it for you"
You think this is about pitch decks or raising money, this is about building a business
You want a consultant to tell you what to do, not collaborate on what matters
You're not ready to confront uncomfortable truths or change your approach when needed
### You're a good fit if:
You're serious about making this work.
You're looking for a partner who can push, challenge, and build alongside you.
You're not looking for another you, you want diversity of thought, dissent, and disagreement.
You're ready for the kind of clarity that comes from honest dialogue, fast decisions, and tested experience.
## What We Actually Work On
Think of this as the 6 steps every founder navigates between idea and early traction. Each one matters. We work through all of them, together.
Read Insights 
### Founder Headspace
How to think, prioritize, and lead, especially when it's hard to know where to start.
### Vision & Strategy
What are you building? Why does it matter? We find the thread that ties it all together.
### Product & Delivery
What's the smallest thing you can ship that proves you're right? And how do you actually ship it?
### Go-To-Market
How do we generate demand before the product is ready, and make sure there's a line of people at the door when it is?
### Delivering Delight
How do you create early user moments that drive retention, referrals, and belief?
### Scalable Something
Whether it's team, tech, or process, we start laying down what's repeatable before things break.
## This Isn't Coaching. It's Co-Building.
You want to move faster. But right. Let's find out if we should build together.
Book Your Intro Call
Why do you charge?
## Not Quite Ready

Build A Product People Want

# The fastest way to finance software and hardware
Choose Capchase as your financing partner to close deals faster and increase your earnings. Approve your buyer, configure your offer, and win your deal in minutes.

Trusted by over 10,000 vendors & buyers
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6146543ab50f167ae088b201/68c2bfd6294531eb547b806e_gradient-1.webp)
### Buyers expect payment options
82% of U.S. companies use financing for equipment and software. If you don’t offer it, you risk losing the deal.
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6146543ab50f167ae088b201/68c2c0d038469984e1c349d7_image-2.webp)

Clunky, slow, and unreliable processes stall sales. Done right, financing accelerates deals and keeps you in control.
### Capchase makes financing easier
Close high-velocity or high-complexity transactions in minutes, not weeks. Reseller partner approved.
## Experience the Capchase advantage
Embedded vendor financing that delivers faster approvals, easy deal configurations, and real-time deal status–right where you work.
For Sales

Use flexible payment options as a competitive advantage. Whether your customer prefers monthly, quarterly, or extended net terms - give them the choice they want.
[Learn more](https://www.capchase.com/department/sales)

Offer payment flexibility while still getting paid upfront on every deal—including multi-year and reseller deals—eliminating billing headaches and putting an end to chasing payments.
[Learn more](https://www.capchase.com/department/finance)

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6146543ab50f167ae088b201/68c2da91024544ae491cae81_webp.webp)

Get paid upfront, empower customers with flexible payments, and leave the collections burden to us. Partner channel approved.

Allow your customers to optimize their cash flow while still purchasing the tech they need to be successful.

## Consulting Solutions
# Engage the  
Power of Kranz.
We are the preeminent accounting and financial solutions firm helping start-ups and Venture Capital companies grow. We believe that every business, at every stage of growth, is a story waiting to be told – and that all companies deserve to reach their full potential.
[What We Do](https://kranz.consulting/services/)
### Who We Are
## We give our clients a competitive advantage.
We deliver seasoned perspectives and insights, from the latest in Artificial Intelligence to M&A trends, the state of capital markets, and even the future of work. In a world of mounting uncertainty and complexity, knowledge is not just power, but peace of mind.
We value mutual respect and true human connections beyond all else because those are the only connections that truly matter. Our trusted relationships are the common thread that guides everything we do.
[Who We Are](https://kranz.consulting/about-us/)
## Our Services
### Supporting entrepreneurship at every stage.
To see additional information about the over 25 services we provide our clients, learn more about our practices.

## We get Silicon Valley   
…and we love growth stories
### Stories are history personified.
Stories, like businesses, are personal and transformational. They have definition and character.
From inception to exit—from startup to medium growth, to earn out and beyond—there are countless stories that shape a company’s future. And we are the storytellers who help bring that future into focus every step of the way.

### Business for Sale Services
Small Business Deal Advisors is a discount-commission business brokerage firm that offers the largest inventory of small businesses and franchises for sale in Michigan and throughout the US and Canada. We provide a best-in-class confidential marketing and broker service to business owners who are seeking to sell their small business. We provide professional materials, an in-depth valuation, powerful marketing, NDA processing, buyer introductions, and guidance throughout the sale process.

First-time founder, student, or corporate innovator?
Shape, validate, and package your business idea from scratch — [all in one chat](https://pitchbob.io/#pricing) with our bot. [PICK A PLAN](https://pitchbob.io/#pricing)
📄
Already have a pitch deck or one-pager?
Don’t want to chat with the bot but need all the docs? Or want them in another language? Just 📥 [drop your file in the chat](https://pitchbob.io/products/improve-pitch-deck) — the bot handles the rest and emails everything to you. Flat one-time $99. No hassle.
[Improve my pitch](https://pitchbob.io/products/improve-pitch-deck)
💰
Fundraising-mode founder or grant-seeking entrepreneur?
We’ve got you covered: start with honest human 💬 [feedback on your idea](https://pitchbob.io/services/startup-feedback), then check if you’re eligible for 🇪🇺 [startup grants in Europe](https://pitchbob.io/services/grants). Use what you need, when you need it.
🔁
Working on your startup long-term?
Need structure, discipline, and a continuous improvement mindset? 🧭 [PitchBob Founders Co-Pilot](https://pitchbob.io/products/ai-startup-founders-co-pilot) supports your monthly rhythm with planning, reflection, and auto-generated founder/stakeholder reports. From $19.9/month.
🏢
Corporation, university, accelerator, VC fund, incubator, or government hub?
We offer 🏷️ [white-label](https://pitchbob.io/services/white-label) solutions starting from $99/month, 📊 [VC pipeline scoring](https://pitchbob.io/products/vc) scoring, 🔎 [free startup scouting](https://pitchbob.io/services/scout-startup), and 🎁 [perk partnerships](https://pitchbob.io/blog/perk-partnership-proposition-for-startup-accelerators-and-incubators) for your community.

##  What is foundersbase?
Foundersbase is a networking platform where startup founders connect with co-founders, entrepreneurial talent, and early supporters to build their ventures.   
  
Members from all over the world create profiles, showcase their startup projects, and engage in direct conversations to form a founding team, find advisors and investors, or recruit startup hires.   
  
Unlike broad networking sites, Foundersbase is specifically designed for founder's needs and uses advanced profile curation technology to ensure that every connection is relevant - whether you're looking for a tech co-founder, a marketing expert, or someone to invest early support in your idea.
